business.name: Prestige Electric
business.tagline: Trusted electrical solutions for Kansas City homes and businesses.

services.title: Service & Repairs
services.description: Troubleshooting, outlet repairs, breaker issues, flickering lights, and safe code corrections.

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: Modern electrical panels, sub-panels, surge protection, and capacity upgrades for growing power needs.

services.title: Lighting & Fans
services.description: Interior lighting, exterior security lighting, ceiling fans, recessed lighting, and efficiency upgrades.

services.title: EV Chargers
services.description: Dedicated circuits and Level 2 EV charger installations for homes, garages, and workplaces.

services.title: Commercial Electrical
services.description: Tenant finishes, maintenance, lighting retrofits, dedicated circuits, and repair support for local businesses.

services.title: Rewiring & Remodels
services.description: Whole-home rewiring, remodel wiring, appliance circuits, and electrical planning for renovations.

process.title: Tell us what is happening
process.description: Call or request a quote and share the electrical problem, upgrade, or project scope.

process.title: Get a clear recommendation
process.description: A knowledgeable electrician reviews the work and explains the safest, most practical solution.

process.title: Enjoy reliable power
process.description: Prestige completes the work cleanly, safely, and with a focus on long-term performance.

faq.question: Do you provide residential and commercial electrical services?
faq.answer: Yes. Prestige Electric handles electrical repairs, installations, panel upgrades, lighting, rewiring, and ongoing service for homes and businesses across the Kansas City metro.

faq.question: Can I request a free electrical estimate?
faq.answer: Yes. You can call +1 (816) 548-9601 or use the quote form to request an estimate for electrical repairs, upgrades, or installations.

faq.question: What are common signs I should call an electrician?
faq.answer: Frequent breaker trips, flickering lights, warm outlets, buzzing panels, burning smells, outdated wiring, or power loss are all signs that a licensed electrician should inspect the system.

faq.question: Do you install EV chargers and upgraded electrical panels?
faq.answer: Yes. Prestige Electric can install dedicated EV charger circuits, Level 2 chargers, new panels, sub-panels, and electrical upgrades for higher-capacity equipment.
